final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: needs a cartoon storybook illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with clear title placement and bullet points positioned alongside
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs story told through cartoon illustrations
Scene/backdrop: needs a narrative scene treatment — exact environmental details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact tone balance is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, kid-appealing direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the clear title, with key story points listed and punctuated alongside
Constraints: must preserve all key story points of the Battle of Red Cliffs, must be suitable for children, single card format only
Avoid:
